ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "re_sort_id" INTEGER /* Re-sort ID for ordering experiments */,
  "subgroup" TEXT /* Subgroup classification for the experiment */,
  "mix1_concentration" REAL /* Concentration in Mix 1 (attomoles/ul) */,
  "mix2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration in Mix 2 (attomoles/ul) */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment is part of */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the result */,
  "mean_norm_counts" REAL /* Mean normalized counts from the experiment */,
  "log2_fold_change" REAL /* Log2 fold change between conditions */,
  "lfcSE" REAL /* Standard error of the log2 fold change */,
  "statistic" REAL /* Test statistic for the analysis */,
  "pvalue" REAL /* P-value from the statistical test */,
  "padj" REAL /* Adjusted p-value after corrections */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the statistical test */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status of the result */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result associated with the statistic */,
  "expected_fold_change" REAL /* Expected fold-change ratio for the experiment */,
  "log2_mix_ratio" REAL /* Log2 of the ratio between Mix 1 and Mix 2 concentrations */,
  "cleaned_padj" REAL /* Cleaned adjusted p-value */,
  "cleaned_pvalue" REAL /* Cleaned p-value after corrections */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the statistical analysis */,
  "cleaning_process" TEXT /* Data cleaning process used */,
  "cleaning_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the data cleaning process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
